description:
Manic Miners is a fan-made remake of the cult classic LEGO Rock Raiders.

This APWorld allows Manic Miners to be combined with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer software, as you play through the campaign in a random order and with building or vehicle restrictions.

v1.0.0.description: Initial release of .apworld for public testing
v1.0.0.title: Manic Miners 1.0.0

v1.0.1.description: Bugfix to split local file directories into correct two locations. (Local install was only one for both, but that was just coincidence.)
v1.0.1.title: v1.0.1

v1.1.0.description:
## What's Changed
* Update setup_en.md: Create the folder if it doesn't already exist by @Nixill in https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/pull/1
* Merge in LRRR and LRRC  by @fogmike in https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/pull/19

## New Contributors
* @Nixill made their first contribution in https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/pull/1
* @fogmike made their first contribution in https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/pull/19

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/compare/v1.0.1...v1.1.0
v1.1.0.title: v1.1.0

v1.1.1.description: Linux Support now in Experimental Release....
v1.1.1.title: v1.1.1

v1.1.3.description:
## What's Changed
* Linuxsupport by @fogmike in https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/pull/23
* Bug fixes for LRRC:RH logic and all non-Hard LRRC times


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/compare/v1.1.0...v1.1.3
v1.1.3.title: v1.1.3

v1.2.0.description:
## What's Changed
* Various logic fixes and some par time adjustments
* New optional feature: Multiple locations per level clear
  
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/compare/v1.1.3...v1.2.0* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
v1.2.0.title: v1.2.0

v1.3.0.description:
What's New:

- Various Bug Fixes
- New Filler: Bonus ore as starting item
- Mixed Level Set Feature: Play a campaign with a shuffled set of levels without duplicates!

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/fogmike/Archipelago_ManicMiners/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0
v1.3.0.title: v1.3.0

v1.4.0.description:
New features:
- Crystal Target locations + victory condition
- Coordinate Hunt victory condition
- Bonus Starting Ore filler
- Chief's Favourite Truck optional bonus item

Removed features:
- Overall Par Time victory condition (for now)

Various bug fixes; mostly logic, but also passworded games will now work
v1.4.0.title: v1.4.0

v1.4.1.description:
Bugfix release to include the following:
- Fixed display of crystal target numbers in client command /power_levels 
- Fixed display name of Locked Coordinates in Options Viewer
- Fixed edge case of broken YAML generation; all generation failures are now FillErrors (though still far too common)

v1.4.1 is compatible with worlds generated on v1.4.0
v1.4.1.title: v1.4.1

v1.4.2.description:
Bugfix for detection of "Research Coordinates" locations when Bonus Clear Locations is disabled.

This client is compatible with games generated on 1.4.x versions.
v1.4.2.title: v1.4.2

v1.4.3.description:
Few bugfixes:

- Added missing Upgrade Station requirement for LRRR - Oresome
- With Coordinate Hunt, don't create locations post-goal
- Fixed access logic for RockyHorror levels that aren't the goal level

Should be compatible with 1.4.x generated worlds
v1.4.3.title: v1.4.3
